## Overview

This page is generated from the Go HTTP mux registrations. If a route is not listed in the reference table, it is not exposed by the current binary.

<Callout type="info">
  The sidecar REST API and the guardrail proxy are separate HTTP surfaces. Both are listed here because both register routes in Go.
</Callout>
